report.summary: Community growth cycle v6: Drafted 4 social posts (Morgan Stanley BTC ETF, March close 6-month streak, 718-page milestone thread, Resolv exploit warning), newsletter v16 for Thu Mar 27, Discord/TG evening update, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (Morgan Stanley ETF + 718 Pages Queue Cleared). Market: BTC $70,600 clinging to ~2% monthly gain, F&G 27 (Fear), stablecoins $312B ATH, Morgan Stanley filed 2nd S-1 for spot BTC ETF, Resolv exploited $23.8M. degen0x: 718 published pages, queue fully cleared, 0 remaining.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #75: Morgan Stanley BTC ETF — 'Morgan Stanley just filed its 2nd S-1 for a spot Bitcoin ETF. The first major US bank.' 6 consecutive ETF inflow days, smart money loading while retail fears; CTA to /learn/bitcoin-etf-guide (Schedule: Tue Mar 25 10AM)

Tweet #76: March Close 6-Month Streak — 'BTC is 7 days from either breaking a 6-month red streak or making history nobody wants.' Stablecoins $312B ATH as contrarian signal, CTA to /tools/fear-greed-timeline (Schedule: Wed Mar 26 12PM)

Tweet #77: 718 Pages Milestone Thread (5 parts) — queue cleared, full category breakdown (90+ tools, 47+ guides, 19 exchanges, 19 wallets, 8-country tax guides), latest additions (BitVM, Market Making), community feature vote CTA (Schedule: Thu Mar 27 2PM)
Tweet #78: Resolv Exploit Warning — $23.8M exploit, 50M unbacked USR minted, protocol paused; promotes Risk Analyzer tool for DeFi safety; CTA to /tools/risk-analyzer (Schedule: Fri Mar 28 10AM)
Discord/TG Evening Update: BTC $70,600 (+$1.8K), F&G 27, stablecoins $312B ATH, Morgan Stanley S-1, queue cleared to 0, BitVM + Market Making guides promoted (Post: Mon Mar 24 8PM)

Newsletter v16 (for Thu Mar 27): Subject 'Morgan Stanley wants your Bitcoin. Here's the S-1 filing.' — market pulse (BTC $70.6K, March close countdown, stablecoins ATH), new on degen0x (BitVM, Market Making, 13-guide content drop), worth reading (Market Cycles, SEC Digital Commodities), degen corner (Resolv exploit + Risk Analyzer)
Content calendar v20 — 4 tweets + 1 newsletter + 1 Discord scheduled Mar 24–28

sections.title: Social Visuals Created

Saved to /public/social-morgan-stanley-btc-etf.svg

SVG card: '718 Published Pages — Queue Cleared' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism, purple MILESTONE badge, massive '718' in brand gradient (indigo->cyan->amber), 11 category pills across 2 rows (Tools, Guides, Exchanges, Wallets, Tax, Blog, DeFi, Insurance, Cards, NFTs, Investing), 3 stat boxes (Day 23 / 0 Remaining / $0 Free), degen0x.com branding. Saved to /public/social-718-pages-queue-cleared.svg

sections.title: Market Intelligence Used
items: BTC: $70,600 (+$1,800 from yesterday). ~2% monthly gain. 7 days to March close — 6-month red streak at stake.
ETH: ~$2,065 (down 9% weekly). BTC dominance ~58.7% rising.
F&G: 27 (Fear). 48-day extreme fear streak broken. Stabilizing in fear zone.
Total crypto market cap: ~$2.33T (-1.11% daily).
Stablecoins: $312B+ ATH. Historical: ATH during fear = rally within 2-4 weeks.
Morgan Stanley: Filed 2nd S-1 for spot BTC ETF — first major US bank.
Spot BTC ETFs: 6 consecutive days of inflows ($201M on Mar 16). Saylor hinting new purchase.
Resolv Labs: Exploited $23.8M — 50M unbacked USR minted. Protocol paused.
SUI: GSUI staking ETF + 2x leveraged ETF on Nasdaq + Sui Bank initiative.
CLARITY Act: Stablecoin bill 99% resolved. Senate markup imminent.
degen0x: 718 published pages. Queue fully cleared (0 remaining). BitVM + Market Making promoted today.
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-24-social-drafts-v6.md
SVGs saved to /public/social-morgan-stanley-btc-etf.svg and /public/social-718-pages-queue-cleared.svg
Posting schedule: Tue Morgan Stanley ETF -> Wed March close streak -> Thu 718-page thread -> Fri Resolv warning
